code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end

  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let threshold = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  mut filtered: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  while j < nums.len()
    let val = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if val > threshold
      filtered = list.push(filtered, val)
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut result = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < filtered.len()
    let val = match filtered.get(k)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if k == 0
      result = "#{val}"
    else
      result = "#{result} #{val}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end

  print(result)
  Ok(())
end
